ddls:
CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "first_last_name" TEXT /* Full name of the member (first and last name) */,
  "primary_email_address" TEXT /* Primary email address of the member */,
  "secondary_email_address" TEXT /* Secondary email address of the member */,
  "last_membership_year" INTEGER /* The year of the last membership renewal */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of member interactions (e.g., number of events attended, number of emails opened) */,
  "recency" INTEGER /* Recency of the last member interaction (e.g., days since the last interaction) */,
  "membership_product_group" TEXT /* Type of membership product (e.g., Lifetime Membership, 1 Year Membership) */,
  "primary_member_type" TEXT /* Primary type of membership (e.g., Regular, Emeritus) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence of the member */,
  "membership_year" INTEGER /* Year the member first joined the organization */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the member */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the member */,
  "address_line_1" TEXT /* First line of the member's mailing address */,
  "address_line_2" TEXT /* Second line of the member's mailing address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the member's mailing address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the member's mailing address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the member's mailing address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Primary phone number of the member */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the member joined the organization */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the member (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Next expected renewal date */,
  "renewal_reminder_sent" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating whether a renewal reminder has been sent */,
  "last_interacted" TEXT /* Date of the last interaction with the member */,
  "total_interactions" INTEGER /* Total number of interactions with the member */,
  "member_category" TEXT /* Category of the member (e.g., Regular, Emeritus, Student) */,
  "benefits_claimed" TEXT /* List of benefits the member has claimed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each member
Full name of the member (first and last name)
Primary email address of the member
Secondary email address of the member
The year of the last membership renewal
Frequency of member interactions (e.g., number of events attended, number of emails opened)
